title: AQUILAW advises Srijan Group on acquisition DLF Techpark II
description: Srijan Group has acquired DLF Limited’s DLF Techpark II, an operational IT/ITES Special Economic Zone, together with an adjoining land parcel, collectively admeasuring approximately 25.9 acres located at New Town, Kolkata, along with structures thereon.AQUILAW advised Srijan Group on this acquisition. The Firm undertook a comprehensive legal and regulatory due diligence of the underlying land and the SEZ undertaking, including verification of title, review of historical land records and assessme
